message:
feat: add package manager, extensions, and fix Unicode panic

- Add package manager with install/remove/update/list commands
- Add extensions module for slash command handling
- Fix Unicode panic in /history command (char-based truncation)
- Expand session picker with improved navigation
- Update agent with abort handling improvements
- Add beads issue tracking integration
- Update documentation and conformance tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 - Path resolution
 - Provider message conversion
+- Package manager source parsing/identity + settings updates
